title: Ceviche de Pescado
description: A refreshing and light South American-inspired dish, perfect for warm weather. This ceviche is made with the freshest catch of the day, marinated in a zesty mixture of lime juice and mixed with crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Fresh Fish (such as sea bass or halibut)

instructions: Cut the fish into small pieces and place in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, mix together the lime juice, fish sauce, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the marinade over the fish and let it sit at room temperature for 10-15 minutes.
Just before serving, stir in the chopped red onion, corn kernels, and red bell pepper.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the ceviche chilled, garnished with additional lime wedges and red onion if desired.
Serve immediately, as the fish will continue to 'cook' in the lime juice.
